_comment: Drives 05_matching_engine.py's thresholds -- nothing about variance tolerance or amount comparison lives in the notebook or in src/matching/engine.py itself. Vendor-scoped like every other config file in this repo.

_notes.amount_comparison_tolerance: Two outstanding_amount values are considered equal if they differ by no more than this (absolute dollars) -- guards against floating-point rounding artifacts from upstream variance math, not a business tolerance for genuine mismatches.
_notes.minor_variance_threshold_pct: gold_reconciliation_summary.overall_status is MINOR_VARIANCE (not EXCEPTIONS_PRESENT) only when there are zero exceptions AND abs(difference)/statement_total is at or below this fraction -- e.g. 0.01 = 1%.
